title: Less Annoying Frost Walker
description: Makes frost walker better and less annoying
body:
## Less Annoying Frost Walker This datapack makes the frost walker enchantment less annoying so that it is more competitive with depth strider
  • Frost walker increases movement speed on all ice types, the same amount as soul speed
  • Frost walker will only freeze open bodies of water - no more ruining farms and bubble elevators
Unfortunately, this datapack is unlikely to be compatible with other datapacks modifying the frost walker enchantment
